title: euphrasia debilis
intro: Euphrasia debilis, also known as small eyebright, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye problems such as conjunctivitis, red eyes, and dry eyes, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Euphrasia debilis include reducing swelling and inflammation, soothing irritated eyes, and promoting the healing of wounds. Herbal preparations of Euphrasia debilis can be made into teas, tinctures, and eye drops, which can be used to treat various eye conditions and promote overall eye health.
